query:
select
                        max(created_at) as "max_created_at!: String",
                        count(*) as "count!: i64",
                        id as "cover_photo_id!: i64"
                    from photos
                    where user_id = $1 and trashed_on is null
                    group by strftime('%Y-%m', created_at)
                    order by 1 desc
